narrative_beat: Frame dividido wide vitrine de shopping brilhante versus cruz de madeira solitaria em deserto

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a split-frame wide shot with bright commercial shopping display on the left and a solitary wooden cross in a desert horizon on the right
subject.focal_point: the vertical seam between the two worlds
subject.secondary: Left side in desaturated cold blue-grey monochrome; right side in rich warm gold-crimson tones.

composition.midground: mall product shelves vs desert sand
composition.background: cold monochrome mall vs warm crimson-gold desert sky

lighting.key_light: cold neon left, warm sunset right
lighting.shadow_quality: hard-edged Caravaggio shadows on right side

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated cold palette on left, warm saturated gold-crimson on right

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
